settings.title: Qatar's Only Authorized Dealer
settings.text: Official dealer for Tigé, ATX, Hyperlite & HO Sports. Every product is genuine and warranty-backed.

settings.title: Free Worldwide Shipping
settings.text: Same-day dispatch from Doha. 3 days GCC, 7 days worldwide. Every order tracked door-to-door.

settings.title: 14-Day Easy Returns
settings.text: Return any unused item within 14 days for a full refund. No questions, no hassle, no restocking fees.

settings.title: Expert Support in <2 Hours
settings.text: Real water sports enthusiasts, not chatbots. WhatsApp, call, or email — we respond fast.
Best wakeboarding gear selection in the Gulf. Shipped to Dubai in 2 days. Absolutely legit.
settings.author: Ahmed K.

settings.text: Bought a full Hyperlite setup — board, bindings, vest. Shamlan walked me through everything on WhatsApp, even sent a video of proper binding setup.
settings.author: Khalid M.

settings.text: Configured my Tigé Z5 through Varkomz. From quote to marina delivery took 8 weeks. The boat is absolutely perfect.
settings.author: James R.

settings.subtitle: SURF PERFORMANCE MEETS STYLE
settings.heading: Design Your Dream Boat
settings.body: We source, stock, and ship the world's best water sports gear — configured for Gulf conditions. From wakeboards to boats, every item hand-picked for performance in warm waters.

settings.heading: Request a Quote
settings.text: Tell us what you're looking for and we'll send a detailed quote with pricing, delivery timeline, and financing options. Whether it's a Tigé, ATX, or gear bundle — we've got you covered.

settings.heading: Join the Crew
settings.subtitle: Get exclusive drops, deals, and Gulf riding content.
